reason: trtexec.exe was not found in PATH or common TensorRT folders on this Windows machine.
checked_commands: Get-ChildItem C:\Program Files, C:\TensorRT, D:\TensorRT, D:\ -Filter trtexec.exe -Recurse
what_was_done_instead: TensorRT FP16 and INT8 engines were benchmarked through Ultralytics validation.
TensorRT FP16/INT8 latency and mAP are reported in results/benchmark_summary.csv.
TensorRT engine info files are stored in runtime_graphs.
A reproducible script was added: scripts/profile_tensorrt_trtexec.py
important_note: Deep TensorRT per-layer profiling requires NVIDIA TensorRT tools / trtexec or trt-engine-explorer. These tools were not present in the current local environment, so the repository contains a reproducible profiling script and an explicit not-run artifact.
